title: armeria maritima var. eriophylla
intro: Armeria maritima var. eriophylla, also known as the sea thrift or dwarf thrift, is a compact, evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plumbaginaceae) and is native to the high mountain regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. eriophylla include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for topical use. Herbal preparations of Armeria maritima var. eriophylla can be found in the form of teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
